title: LEGO Speed Champions Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Race Car Model with a Collectible Formula 1 Driver Minifigure - Display Set for Adult Motorsport & Racing Fans 77243
features: F1 LEGO Red Bull vehicle for adults – LEGO Speed Champions Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Race Car model to build for Red Bull and Formula 1 fans
Authentic F1 Red Bull details – F1 model car for adults features 2024 design details like the rear wing, halo bar, and wider rear tyres with “Pirelli”
F1 minifigure – This model kit for adults to build includes a driver minifigure in a Red Bull outfit and helmet, ready to be placed in the cockpit
F1 fun for all the family – Race for the checkered flag alongside the whole family with other model cars (sold separately) in the LEGO F1 range
Ferrari F1 display model – After a rewarding building experience, this LEGO Red Bull F1 car can be proudly displayed at home or in the office
Formula 1 gift idea – This F1 merchandise makes a great LEGO gift for men and women who are fans of the Red Bull F1 team and immersive building projects
Build and display iconic LEGO vehicles – LEGO Speed Champions sets let car lovers create brick-built versions of some of the world’s most famous vehicles
description: From the manufacturer Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Race Car set Formula 1 fans can build their own Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Race Car with this Speed Champions building set for adults. Just like the real-life version! LEGO model features authentic design details from the car that competed in the 2024 Formula 1 World Championship season. LEGO Speed Champions Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Race Car Brick-built F1 model car Create an Oracle Red Bull Racing RB20 F1 Race Car. Red Bull F1 details Includes rear wing, sponsor logos and wider rear tyres. 1 driver minifigure Driver wears a Red Bull outfit and a helmet with a wing. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. F1 fun for all the family Race for the chequered flag alongside the whole family with other building sets (sold separately) in the LEGO F1 range.
